top_signals.title: Ukraine identifies infostealer operator tied to 28,000 stolen accounts
top_signals.summary: The Ukrainian cyberpolice, working in conjunction with U.S. law enforcement, has identified an 18-year-old man from Odesa suspected of running an infostealer malware operation targeting users of an online store in California. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cost of living boost with free bus travel for children and targeted food tariff cuts
top_signals.summary: Chancellor to announce ‘Great British Summer Savings’ - a UK wide scheme to help families enjoy this summer

top_signals.title: Heated tobacco products may be more harmful than cigarettes, Japan panel review says
top_signals.summary: The literature review found that heated tobacco products may produce greater amounts of cancer-causing substances than regular cigarettes.
